mnemonics.title: **P**ositive, **S**um to 1: Think of a '**P**robab
mnemonics.content: all entries must be non-negative and their total must be a statement of certainty (1).

mnemonics.title: Key Point 1
mnemonics.content: A probability vector is a vector where each component is a non-negative real number.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 2
mnemonics.content: The sum of all components in a probability vector must equal 1.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 3
mnemonics.content: They represent the state of a system in a Markov chain, where each element is the probability of being in a particular state.
